'''''Arditi''''' was a group of three [[CR92a Assassin-class corvette|''Assassin''-class corvettes]] used by [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin]]'s [[Zaarin coup forces|splinter government]] [[Zaarin's fleet|fleet]]. Along with [[Falcon group|''Falcon'' group]] and [[BaKaar group|''BaKaar'' group]], it was sent to destroy [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Lord Vader's]] [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]], the [[Garrett (Star Destroyer)|''Garrett'']]. However, [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Ace/Legends|ace]] [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]] helped the ''Garrett'' destroy the [[Corvette/Legends|corvettes]] along with the other groups.

{{Ship-stub}}
